Maggy20138790

  The iVoox app is good just need to ritate the adv. it is very annoying to listen the same adv over and over. Second. It is very frustrating with the audiobooks. Instead of have the chapter from 1 to 100, it runs from 100 to 1. Which i found disturbing because how you will listen a book from the end to the front. I mean it will be nice if you can have an option to select the orden of the audiobook front the first chapter to the end not backwards. It will be an excellent app if you guys correct it.Thank you❤️🌺

  Developer Response

  Hello Maggy20138790, the current version of ivoox App is 3.66, we invite you to prove it. if you have more questions please sent us a message to ios@ivoox.comThanks. [...] SC:official\_king7

  my only issue is that when i scroll down subscriptions it takes way too long to load older episodes im trying to get down all the way to the very 1st episode but its not possible on the mobile app i would give it 5 stars but this glitch is really significant and needs to get fixed because I would love to scroll down the subscriptions episodes and find podcasts but as of now I could only listen to the latest ones which is a bummer cause there’s so many to listen to if only I could scroll down fasterUpdate: I checked again and it was fixed :) I will be updating a 5 star review thanks!

### Technical Support

Exceptional tech support extends beyond technical know-how. It entails patient communication, clear explanations of solutions, and a genuine commitment to assisting users in navigating complex issues. Great tech support transforms frustration into relief by not only fixing problems but also empowering users with a deeper understanding of their technology. This will build lasting relationships, leading to reduced churn and increased customer advocacy.

sales-gen

### Sales and Revenue Generation [...] it-sup

### Helpdesk / IT Support

Dependable partnership is key to smooth operation of your technology infrastructure and iVox gives you just that. We understand that technology issues disrupt your business operations and creates customer dissatisfaction which is why our skilled Help Desk and Technical Support teams are committed to resolving problems swiftly and effectively. Technical glitches, troubleshooting software and hardware issues, or providing guidance on IT-related concerns, we are there for you and your customers 24/7 ensuring minimal downtime and maximum productivity.

results.title: iVox Solutions | Outsource Accelerator
results.content:
## iVox Solutions reviews and comparisons

iVox is goal-driven and determined to provide great customer and client experiences. Both employees and clients are overall satisfied with iVox Solutions. According to Glassdoor, many employees have a great experience with iVox, and 100% of employees and prospective employees had a great interview experience.

## iVox Solutions’s contact information

iVox Solutions’s main headquarters is located in:

  N/A

Further, you may virtually reach out the company through the following contact information:

Website 

LinkedIn 

Facebook 

In addition, you may email them at contact@ivoxsolutions.com or call 772-301-1710.

## References

## iVox Solutions news, podcast & articles

No news, podcast & articles available for this BPO [...] iVox Solutions recognizes that acquiring new customers costs more money than retaining existing ones, so iVox allows you to focus your business’s energy on profit and growth while they handle the customer service relations. 

iVox takes the opportunity to increase revenue while handling customer relations. iVox trains its employees to upsell and cross-sell customers to help generate more profit for the client, which most other contact centers fail to do.

## Key executives

### Rob Newton (CEO)

Rob Newton has been the CEO of iVox Solutions since 2003. His goal with iVox is to find innovative solutions to clients’ needs. He graduated from Indian River State College in 2000 with a Bachelor of Science in Business Administration and Management.

## iVox Solutions reviews and comparisons [...] Social media services

### iVox Solutions’ pricing

iVox Solutions recognizes that obtaining and retaining clients is an expensive task. They also acknowledge that outsourcing can be daunting, so iVox works to help provide an exceptional customer service experience onshore without breaking the bank. 

iVox Solutions doesn’t list specific prices on its website, but you can fill out an online form to have an agent contact you concerning prices.

## How iVox Solutions outshines its competition

Unlike other contact centers that work to solely provide a good customer service experience, iVox Solutions works to help you grow your business as well.
